description_long: This range hood is a rectangular appliance with a clean, minimalist design, primarily finished in a glossy white color. The front face is flat and unadorned, with a small, dark rectangular control panel visible on the right side. The top and bottom surfaces are smooth, and the sides are sharply defined, giving the object a boxy, utilitarian appearance. The vent openings are not immediately visible from the exterior, suggesting they may be located on the underside or rear. There are no visible brand logos or decorative elements, emphasizing a functional, modern aesthetic. The overall construction appears to be metal, likely steel, with possible internal components such as filters and fans.
description: A sleek, boxy white range hood with a minimalist design and a small control panel on the front right. The exterior is smooth and glossy, with no visible vents or logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rectangular profile and the sloped underside, with no visible controls or vents.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat face, a small dark control panel on the right, and the overall clean design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the sloped underside and plain side surface.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, featureless surface with no visible controls or vents.
attribute_control_panel_type: A small rectangular push-button or digital control panel located on the front right side of the range hood.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are not visible in the images; likely located on the underside or rear of the range hood.
attribute_filter_design: No filter is visible in the images; likely an internal mesh or baffle filter accessible from the underside.
